mapper.select: /** UsptStdrRecomendClDao.selectList */ select cc.code as recomend_cl_cd , cc.code_nm as recomend_cl_nm , cc.code_type as recomend_cl_type_cd , case when usrc.stdr_bsns_cd is null then false else true end as is_checked from cmmt_code cc left outer join uspt_stdr_recomend_cl usrc on usrc.recomend_cl_type_cd = cc.code_type and usrc.recomend_cl_cd = cc.code and usrc.stdr_bsns_cd = #{stdrBsnsCd} where cc.code_group = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@RC_CODE_GROUP}' and cc.enabled = true and cc.code_type in ('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@RC_BSR}', '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@RC_FNTN}') order by cc.code_type desc, cc.sort_order
